title: Hide Mass Email Tracking from Sidebar
excerpt: Ability to hide the “Mass email tracking” section from the CRM’s sidebar. Just a few colleagues use it from our team. Customizing the sidebar as Admin.

posts.author: raul (Raul)
posts.cookedHtml: Ability to hide the “Mass email tracking” section from the CRM’s sidebar. Just a few colleagues use it from our team. Customizing the sidebar as Admin.
